title: Claude Fable 5 with Harness Engineering & Loops Will Do Everything.
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses Claude Fable 5 capabilities with a focus on prompt engineering and agentic loops for SaaS applications. The video covers implications of relying on closed-source models versus open-source alternatives and risks in the evolving AI SaaS landscape.
writeup: Cyril Imhof walks through Claude Fable 5, centering on prompt engineering and agentic loops applied to SaaS applications. The discussion weighs the tradeoffs of building on closed-source foundation models against open-source alternatives, and flags risks in the shifting AI SaaS landscape. The takeaways: feedback loops and harness engineering extend what the model can do, and dependence on a closed model carries structural risk worth accounting for.
